description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
New Features
Section titled “New Features”
- Added “Update Users” to Scheduled Reports tools, runs bulk user updates from a CSV file on a schedule
- Added “Import from v2” button to Manage Templates dialog for importing legacy UserCreationTemplates.config files
- Added Columns button to AD Cleanup page with Column Customization dialog
- Added search box to AD Cleanup results grid with debounce
- Added Password Expires column to Password Reset & Unlock search results
- Added right-click context menu (Reset Password, Unlock Account) to Password Reset search grid
- Added show/hide password toggle on Create Single User page, removed confirm password field
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- Fixed dashboard “Expiring in 30 Days” count not matching slideout results (default filter was 14 days)
- Fixed AD Cleanup results grid showing extra empty row (CanUserAddRows)
- Fixed Reset Password dialog appearing in random position (missing Owner)
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Bulk Password Reset page redesigned into single card layout with inline toolbar and compact user count
- AD Cleanup page: added Email, Description, Department, Title, Company, Manager, and Distinguished Name as optional columns
- AD Cleanup page: Account Status column now shows Enabled/Disabled with color badges
- AD Cleanup page: Browse OU is now a proper styled button
